user.title: Govee Hass Connect
user.description:
Enter the IPv4 addresses of your Govee devices. Use commas or new lines to separate multiple IPs.

This integration is designed for segmented networks (VLANs) where multicast discovery does not work.

data_description.static_ips:
One IP per line, or comma-separated. Example:
192.168.10.100
192.168.10.101

error.invalid_ip: One or more IP addresses are invalid. Enter valid IPv4 addresses.
error.no_ips: At least one IP address is required.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach any of the specified devices. Verify the IPs are correct and the devices are powered on.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is supported.

init.title: Update Device IPs
init.description: Update the list of Govee device IP addresses.

data_description.static_ips: One IP per line, or comma-separated.

error.invalid_ip: One or more IP addresses are invalid. Enter valid IPv4 addresses.
error.no_ips: At least one IP address is required.

port_in_use.message: UDP port {port} is already in use. Another instance of this integration may be running.

no_devices_found.message: No Govee devices responded at the configured IPs. Check that the devices are powered on and reachable from this host. If your devices are on a different VLAN, ensure firewall rules allow UDP traffic on ports 4001–4003.
